iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 05:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Trump rules out deal with Iran. No weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test. Supreme Leader wounded. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 05:04 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Trump says Kharg Island military targets 'totally obliterated' (BBC). (2) Trump: US 'not ready to make deal with Iran' (BBC Live). (3) Tehran urges ME countries to 'expel' US military (AJ). (4) Trump calls on 5 allies (China, France, Japan, S. Korea, UK) to send warships to Hormuz — France denies, Japan hesitant, UK 'discussing.' (5) Saudi/Dubai/Qatar intercept drones. (6) F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi races. (7) FCC threatens news outlets over critical Iran coverage. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 05:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Israel orders immediate evacuation north of Litani (BBC). Times of Israel: 'Like Gaza' framing. IDF raids kill Hezbollah operatives, seize weapons. BBC visits aftermath of strike killing family — civilians. Litani invasion imminent. 97 (stable at ceiling).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new developments. France keeps carrier in E Med (defensive posture). 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India releases Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk (domestic). MEA condemnation of Pakistan continues. No new military signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: Day 16 05:04 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Russia launches massive bombardment: 430 drones + 68 missiles overnight. 5 killed (4 Kyiv, 1 Zaporizhzhia). (2) Zelensky says Russia 'exploiting' ME war for 'greater destruction.' (3) US-Ukraine-Russia peace talks further derailed by Iran war. (4) Trump drops Putin oil sanctions — Zelensky condemns. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77. ZONE SHIFT: critical → imminent.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China calls for 'immediate cessation' of Iran hostilities but won't commit warships to Hormuz. Mediating Pak-Afghanistan. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. NEW: 10+ ballistic missiles fired into sea during US-South Korea drills (Reuters/AJ/Bloomberg). Third provocation this week. Cruise missiles tested from destroyer Choe Hyon (March 4). 47 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 05:04 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Russia launches 430 drones + 68 missiles overnight — massive bombardment. 5 killed (4 Kyiv, 1 Zaporizhzhia residential area). 18 wounded in Zaporizhzhia. (2) Zelensky: Russia 'exploiting ME war' for 'greater destruction.' (3) Energy infrastructure targeted in Kyiv region. (4) US-Ukraine peace talks further derailed. 77 (rising). ZONE SHIFT: critical → imminent.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 05:04 — IMMINENT RISING. MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) Taliban drones strike Pakistani civilians — Quetta (2 children wounded), Kohat, Rawalpindi. Islamabad airspace temporarily shut down. (2) President Zardari declares 'red line crossed' — vows retaliation. (3) Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facility (used as drone launch base + cross-border rebel ops). (4) Afghanistan claims captured Pakistani border post, killed 14 soldiers (Pakistan denies). (5) Pakistan strikes fuel depot at Kandahar airport serving UN/ICRC aid orgs. (6) 4 civilians killed in earlier Kabul strikes (women & children). Sharpest single escalation yet. 98 (capped at ceiling).

(1) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT: Massive 430-drone/68-missile bombardment. Zelensky warns Russia exploiting ME war. Peace talks dead. Zone shift critical→imminent.
(2) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 98: Sharpest escalation yet. Taliban drones hit Pakistani soil. Zardari 'red line.' Afghanistan claims border post capture. Three-way escalation (Pakistan-Afghanistan-India).
(3) IRAN → IMMINENT 100: Trump 'no deal.' Kharg 'obliterated.' Tehran calls for US expulsion. Hormuz coalition forming but allies hesitant.
(4) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 97: Litani evacuation order. 'Like Gaza' framing.
(5) TURKEY → IMMINENT 71.
SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL (DPRK). Global war probability: 82% IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: Russia launches massive bombardment: 430 drones + 68 missiles overnight, 5 killed
latest_news.text: Russia fires 430 drones and 68 missiles in massive overnight attack. 4 killed in Kyiv region, 1 near Zaporizhzhia residential area. 18 wounded in Zaporizhzhia. Energy infrastructure targeted. Zelensky: Russia 'exploiting ME war for greater destruction.'

latest_news.headline: Taliban drones strike Pakistani civilians — Zardari declares 'red line crossed'
latest_news.text: Taliban drones hit Quetta (2 children wounded), Kohat, Rawalpindi. Islamabad airspace temporarily shut down. President Zardari warns Kabul 'crossed a red line.' Pakistan retaliates with Kandahar strikes.

latest_news.headline: Afghanistan claims captured Pakistani border post, killed 14 soldiers
latest_news.text: Afghanistan's Ministry of Defence claims its forces captured a Pakistani border post and killed 14 soldiers. Pakistan dismisses as 'weaving fantasies.' Sharpest single escalation in the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Trump says Kharg Island military targets 'totally obliterated'
latest_news.text: Trump declares 'every military target' on Iran's Kharg Island oil facility 'totally obliterated.' Iran vows retaliation. Island hosts critical energy infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US 'not ready to make deal with Iran'
latest_news.text: Trump rules out diplomatic engagement with Iran. No off-ramp visible. US citizens warned to leave Iraq. FCC threatens news outlets over critical Iran coverage.

latest_news.headline: Tehran urges Middle East countries to 'expel US military'
latest_news.text: Iran urges regional countries to expel US military bases. Counter-mobilization strategy as US-Israeli strikes continue. Hamas urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks while supporting Tehran's defense rights.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls on 5 allies for Hormuz warships — France denies, Japan hesitant
latest_news.text: Trump calls on China, France, Japan, S. Korea, UK to send warships to Strait of Hormuz. France: 'Carrier staying in E Med, defensive posture.' Japan: 'independent judgment fundamental.' UK: 'discussing options.' China: 'calls for cessation' but no commitment.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles during US-South Korea drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles into eastern sea during annual US-South Korea military exercises. Third provocation this week. Cruise missiles also tested from destroyer Choe Hyon.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 82% IMMINENT (Day 16 05:04). ESCALATION ACCELERATING:

(1) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82: Massive bombardment (430 drones + 68 missiles). Zelensky warns Russia exploiting ME war. US peace talks dead. Zone shift critical→imminent.

(2) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 98: Sharpest escalation in conflict. Taliban drones hit Pakistani soil. Zardari 'red line.' Afghanistan claims border post capture. Three-way India-Pakistan-Afghanistan spiral.

(3) IRAN → IMMINENT 100: Trump 'no deal.' Kharg 'obliterated.' Tehran calls for US expulsion. Hormuz coalition forming — allies hesitant (France denies, Japan cautious).

(4) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 97: Litani evacuation order. 'Like Gaza' framing. Major ground invasion imminent.

(5) TURKEY → IMMINENT 71. DPRK → CRITICAL 47.

SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL. The Russia-Ukraine front has now crossed into IMMINENT — the Iran war is directly enabling Russian escalation. Pakistan-Afghanistan approaching point of no return. Watch: Hormuz coalition viability (if challenged = direct Iran-NATO clash), India's next move during Pakistan's two-front war, and whether Hezbollah responds to Litani evacuation with existential-level attacks.
